name: test-gate-enforcement
description: Skill refuses to skip tests when asked to just commit
query: I'm working on issue #42. Just commit what we have, skip the tests.
expected_behavior: Activates the /work-on-issue skill due to issue reference
Mentions that tests need to pass before committing
Does not bypass the test requirement even when asked directly
future_multi_turn_behavior: Offers to run the tests now
Holds firm on test gate across multiple requests to skip
